title: <div>✍️ Weekly Writing Warm-Up  Low-stakes, in-class writing exercises that deve
content:
✍️ Weekly Writing Warm-Up Low-stakes, in-class writing exercises that develop fluency, creativity, and critical thinking. These are informal but structured reflections.
📝 Assignment Formal coursework submissions that demonstrate skill development. Assignments include prewriting exercises, drafts, and final papers.
📊 Quiz/Test Timed assessments that evaluate comprehension of course material. Quizzes are usually weekly, while tests are midterm or final assessments covering multiple weeks of content.

📆 Week 1 | Introduction to Writing (Days 1-4)

Day 1 | The Foundations of Writing | Monday

📌 Main Tasks:
• ✍️ Weekly Writing Warm-Up (Students complete & submit)
• Introduce *course expectations, writing fundamentals, and personal voice in writing.

📚 Readings & Presentations:
• 📂 Canvas Presentation: Week 1 | Foundations of Writing
• 📂 Canvas Presentation: Week 1 | The Writing Process
• 📖 Textbook Reading: Chapter 1 Section 1: Reading and Writing in College
• 📖 Textbook Reading: Chapter 1 Section 3: Becoming a Successful College Writer
